title: Notes
bodyHtml:
Need to write something down fast? That's what Notes is for.

Creating a note

  1. Open the 📝 Notes app
  2. Tap + New Note
  3. Tap the title to rename it
  4. Start typing

Notes save automatically when you tap away or go back to the list — no save button to remember.

What you can do with notes

  • Pick a color — tap the color picker to color-code your notes so they're easy to spot
  • Rename — tap the title to change it
  • Delete — done with a note? Tap the delete button (you'll be asked to confirm)

Tips

  • Use notes for quick reminders, study summaries, or brain dumps before a test
  • Keep it short — if your note is turning into an essay, maybe it's time to open a doc instead
description: How to use the Notes app to jot down ideas, reminders, and study summaries.
